name: Beth's Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine about half of the flour and all other ingredients (except plain sugar). Beat with an electric mixer on medium to high speed until thoroughly blended.
2. Gradually beat in the remaining flour.
3. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in white sugar.
4. Place the dough balls 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until set and tops are cracked.
6. Cool cookies on a wire rack. Makes about 48 cookies.
